description: Respondents strongly value children learning independence and determination over obedience. High emphasis on personal decision-making in daily life.
source_note: Stylised from WVS Wave 7 (2017-2022) items A001-A006 (important child qualities: obedience vs independence). Autonomy score = fraction selecting independence/self-reliance traits. No specific country named.

description: Balanced distribution between autonomy and obedience values. Reflects societies in cultural transition or with significant internal heterogeneity.
source_note: Stylised from WVS Wave 7 middle-quartile societies.

description: Stronger cultural norm toward following established conventions and accepting provided services. Lower emphasis on personal task mastery.
source_note: Stylised from WVS Wave 7 societies with higher obedience/conformity scores and service-intensive economies.
